translations.eng: Lose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] until the end of this turn.
translations.zhs: 在本回合结束前失去[blue]{Amount}[/blue]点[gold]力量[/gold]。
translations.deu: Verliere [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Stärke[/gold] bis zum Ende dieses Zuges.
translations.esp: Quita [blue]{Amount}[/blue] de [gold]fuerza[/gold] hasta el final de este turno.
translations.fra: Perdez [blue]{Amount}[/blue] de [gold]Force[/gold] jusqu'à la fin de ce tour.
translations.ita: Perdi [blue]{Amount}[/blue] di [gold]Forza[/gold] fino al termine di questo turno.
translations.jpn: このターン終了時まで、[gold]筋力[/gold][blue]{Amount}[/blue]を失う。
translations.ptb: Perde [blue]{Amount}[/blue] de [gold]Força[/gold] até o final deste turno.
translations.spa: Pierde [blue]{Amount}[/blue] de [gold]Fuerza[/gold] hasta el final del turno.
translations.tha: เสีย [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]ความแข็งแรง[/gold]จนจบเทิร์นนี้

translations.eng: Lose [gold]Strength[/gold] until the end of this turn.
translations.zhs: 在本回合结束前失去[gold]力量[/gold]。
translations.deu: Verliere [gold]Stärke[/gold] bis zum Ende dieses Zuges.
translations.esp: Quita [gold]fuerza[/gold] hasta el final de este turno.
translations.fra: Perdez de la [gold]Force[/gold] jusqu'à la fin de ce tour.
translations.ita: Perdi [gold]Forza[/gold] fino al termine di questo turno.
translations.jpn: このターン終了時まで、[gold]筋力[/gold]を失う。
translations.ptb: Perde [gold]Força[/gold] até o final deste turno.
translations.spa: Pierde [gold]Fuerza[/gold] hasta el final del turno.
translations.tha: เสีย[gold]ความแข็งแรง[/gold]จนจบเทิร์นนี้

name: Pillar of Creation
description: Whenever you create a card, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].

translations.eng: Pillar of Creation
translations.zhs: 创世之柱
translations.deu: Säule der Schöpfung
translations.esp: Pilar de la creación
translations.fra: Pilier de la Création
translations.ita: Pilastro della Creazione
translations.jpn: 創造の柱
translations.ptb: Pilar da Criação
translations.spa: Pilar de la Creación

translations.eng: Whenever you create a card, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
translations.zhs: 每当你创造一张牌时，获得[blue]{Amount}[/blue]点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
translations.deu: Wenn du eine Karte erzeugst, erhalte [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
translations.esp: Al crear una carta, brinda [blue]{Amount}[/blue] de [gold]bloqueo[/gold].
translations.fra: Chaque fois que vous créez une carte, gagnez [blue]{Amount}[/blue] d'[gold]Armure[/gold].
translations.ita: Ogni volta che crei una carta, ottieni [blue]{Amount}[/blue] di [gold]Blocco[/gold].
translations.jpn: カードを作成するたび、[blue]{Amount}[/blue][gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。
translations.ptb: Sempre que você criar uma carta, receba [blue]{Amount}[/blue] de [gold]Proteção[/gold].
translations.spa: Cuando creas una carta, obtienes [blue]{Amount}[/blue] de [gold]Bloqueo[/gold].
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณสร้างการ์ด ได้รับ [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]บล็อก[/gold]

translations.eng: Whenever you create a card, gain [blue]5[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
translations.zhs: 每当你创造一张牌时，获得[blue]5[/blue]点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
translations.deu: Wenn du eine Karte erzeugst, erhalte [blue]5[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
translations.esp: Al crear una carta, brinda [blue]5[/blue] de [gold]bloqueo[/gold].
translations.fra: Lorsque vous créez une carte, gagnez [blue]5[/blue] d'[gold]Armure[/gold].
translations.ita: Ogni volta che crei una carta, ottieni [blue]5[/blue] di [gold]Blocco[/gold].
translations.jpn: カードを作成するたび、[blue]5[/blue][gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。
translations.ptb: Sempre que você criar uma carta, receba [blue]5[/blue] de [gold]Proteção[/gold].
translations.spa: Cuando creas una carta, obtienes [blue]5[/blue] de [gold]Bloqueo[/gold].
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณสร้างการ์ด ได้รับ [blue]5[/blue] [gold]บล็อก[/gold]

name: Plating
description: At the end of your turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold]. [gold]Plating[/gold] is reduced by [blue]{Decrement}[/blue] at the start of your turn.

translations.eng: Plating
translations.zhs: 覆甲
translations.deu: Panzerung
translations.esp: Revestimiento
translations.fra: Blindage
translations.ita: Placcatura
translations.jpn: プレート
translations.ptb: Blindagem
translations.spa: Blindaje
translations.tha: เกราะโลหะ

translations.eng: At the end of your turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold]. [gold]Plating[/gold] is reduced by [blue]{Decrement}[/blue] at the start of your turn.
translations.zhs: 在你的回合结束时获得[blue]{Amount}[/blue]点[gold]格挡[/gold]。[gold]覆甲[/gold]会在你的回合开始时减少[blue]{Decrement}[/blue]层。
translations.deu: Erhalte immer am Ende deines Zuges [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold]. [gold]Panzerung[/gold] wird zu Beginn deines Zuges um [blue]{Decrement}[/blue] reduziert.
translations.esp: Al final del turno, brinda [blue]{Amount}[/blue] de [gold]bloqueo[/gold]. [gold]Revestimiento[/gold] se reduce en [blue]{Decrement}[/blue] al comienzo del turno.
translations.fra: À la fin de votre tour, gagnez [blue]{Amount}[/blue] d'[gold]Armure[/gold]. Le [gold]Blindage[/gold] diminue de [blue]{Decrement}[/blue] au début de votre tour.
translations.ita: Al termine del tuo turno, ottieni [blue]{Amount}[/blue] di [gold]Blocco[/gold]. [gold]Placcatura[/gold] si riduce di [blue]{Decrement}[/blue] all'inizio del tuo turno.
translations.jpn: ターン終了時、[blue]{Amount}[/blue][gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。ターン開始時、[gold]プレート[/gold]が[blue]{Decrement}[/blue]減少する。
translations.kor: 내 턴 종료 시, [gold]방어도[/gold]를 [blue]{Amount}[/blue] 획득합니다. [gold]판금[/gold]은 내 턴 시작 시 [blue]{Decrement}[/blue] 감소합니다.
translations.pol: Pod koniec tury zyskaj [blue]{Amount}[/blue] pkt. [gold]Bloku[/gold]. Na początku tury zmniejsz [gold]Opancerzenie[/gold] o [blue]{Decrement}[/blue] pkt.
translations.ptb: No final de seu turno, recebe [blue]{Amount}[/blue] de [gold]Proteção[/gold]. [gold]Blindagem[/gold] é reduzida em [blue]{Decrement}[/blue] no início de seu turno.
translations.rus: Дает [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]защиты[/gold] в конце хода. Понижается на [blue]{Decrement}[/blue] в начале хода.
translations.spa: Al final de tu turno, gana [blue]{Amount}[/blue] de [gold]Bloqueo[/gold]. El [gold]Blindaje[/gold] se reduce en [blue]{Decrement}[/blue] al comienzo de tu turno.
translations.tha: ตอนจบเทิร์น ได้รับ [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]บล็อก[/gold] [gold]เกราะโลหะ[/gold]ลดลง [blue]{Decrement}[/blue] ตอนเริ่มต้นเทิร์น
translations.tur: Turunun sonunda [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Blok[/gold] elde et. [gold]Zırh[/gold], turunun başında [blue]{Decrement}[/blue] azalır.

translations.eng: At the end of your turn, gain [gold]Block[/gold]. [gold]Plating[/gold] is reduced by [blue]1[/blue] at the start of your turn.
translations.zhs: 在你的回合结束时获得[gold]格挡[/gold]。[gold]覆甲[/gold]会在你的回合开始时减少[blue]1[/blue]层。
translations.deu: Erhalte immer am Ende deines Zuges [gold]Block[/gold]. [gold]Panzerung[/gold] wird zu Beginn deines Zuges um [blue]1[/blue] reduziert.
translations.esp: Al final del turno, brinda [gold]bloqueo[/gold]. [gold]Revestimiento[/gold] se reduce en [blue]1[/blue] al comienzo del turno.
translations.fra: À la fin de votre tour, gagnez de l'[gold]Armure[/gold]. Le [gold]Blindage[/gold] diminue de [blue]1[/blue] au début de votre tour.
translations.ita: Al termine del tuo turno, ottieni [gold]Blocco[/gold]. [gold]Placcatura[/gold] si riduce di [blue]1[/blue] all'inizio del tuo turno.
translations.jpn: ターン終了時、[gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。ターン開始時、[gold]プレート[/gold]が[blue]1[/blue]減少する。
translations.kor: 내 턴 종료 시, [gold]방어도[/gold]를 획득합니다. [gold]판금[/gold]은 내 턴 시작 시 [blue]1[/blue] 감소합니다.
translations.pol: Pod koniec tury zyskaj [gold]Blok[/gold]. Na początku tury zmniejsz [gold]Opancerzenie[/gold] o [blue]1[/blue] pkt.
translations.ptb: No final do seu turno, receba [gold]Proteção[/gold]. [gold]Blindagem[/gold] é reduzida em [blue]1[/blue] no início do seu turno.
translations.rus: Дает [gold]защиту[/gold] в конце хода. Понижается на [blue]1[/blue] в начале хода.
translations.spa: Al final de tu turno, gana [gold]Bloqueo[/gold]. El [gold]Blindaje[/gold] se reduce en [blue]1[/blue] al comienzo de tu turno.
translations.tha: ตอนจบเทิร์น ได้รับ[gold]บล็อก[/gold] [gold]เกราะโลหะ[/gold]ลดลง [blue]1[/blue] ตอนเริ่มต้นเทิร์น
translations.tur: Turunun sonunda [gold]Blok[/gold] elde et. [gold]Zırh[/gold], turunun başında [blue]1[/blue] azalır.

name: Plow
description: The first time [gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold] HP reaches [blue]{Amount}[/blue] or below, it becomes [gold]Stunned[/gold] and loses all its [gold]Strength[/gold].

translations.eng: Plow
translations.zhs: 横冲直撞
translations.deu: Pflügen
translations.esp: Colapso
translations.fra: Cavalcade
translations.ita: Aratura
translations.jpn: すき込み
translations.ptb: Quebra
translations.spa: Ceremonia

translations.eng: The first time [gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold] HP reaches [blue]{Amount}[/blue] or below, it becomes [gold]Stunned[/gold] and loses all its [gold]Strength[/gold].
translations.zhs: [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold]的生命值第一次下降到[blue]{Amount}[/blue]或更低时，将其[gold]击晕[/gold]并使其失去所有[gold]力量[/gold]。
translations.deu: Wenn die TP des [gold]{OwnerName}es[/gold] zum ersten Mal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] oder weniger erreichen, wird es [gold]Betäubt[/gold] und verliert all seine [gold]Stärke[/gold].
translations.esp: La primera vez que los PV de [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] lleguen a [blue]{Amount}[/blue] o menos, se [gold]aturdirá[/gold] y perderá toda su [gold]fuerza[/gold].
translations.fra: La première fois que [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] passe la barre des [blue]{Amount}[/blue] PV, il est [gold]Étourdi[/gold] et perd sa [gold]Force[/gold].
translations.ita: La prima volta che i PV di [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] sono pari o inferiori a [blue]{Amount}[/blue], subisce [gold]Stordimento[/gold] e perde tutta la sua [gold]Forza[/gold].
translations.jpn: [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold]のHPが初めて[blue]{Amount}[/blue]以下になった時、[gold]スタン[/gold]し、すべての[gold]筋力[/gold]を失う。
translations.kor: [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold]의 체력이 처음으로 [blue]{Amount}[/blue] 이하로 떨어질 시, 대상이 [gold]기절[/gold] 상태가 되고 모든 [gold]힘[/gold]을 잃습니다.
translations.pol: [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] otrzyma [gold]Ogłuszenie[/gold] i straci wszystkie pkt. [gold]Siły[/gold], gdy będzie mieć [blue]{Amount}[/blue] PŻ lub mniej (jednorazowo).
translations.ptb: Na primeira vez que os PV de [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] chegarem a [blue]{Amount}[/blue] ou menos, esta criatura fica [gold]Atordoada[/gold] e perde toda a [gold]Força[/gold].
translations.rus: [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] [gold]оглушается[/gold] и теряет всю [gold]силу[/gold], когда ОЗ понижается до [blue]{Amount}[/blue] или меньше.
translations.spa: La primera vez que los PV de [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] lleguen a [blue]{Amount}[/blue] o menos, queda [gold]Aturdida[/gold] y pierde toda su [gold]Fuerza[/gold].
translations.tha: ครั้งแรกที่[gold]{OwnerName}[/gold]เหลือไม่เกิน [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP มันจะ[gold]ติดสตัน[/gold]และเสีย[gold]ความแข็งแรง[/gold]ทั้งหมด
translations.tur: [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold], CP'si ilk kez [blue]{Amount}[/blue] veya altına düştüğünde [gold]Sersemler[/gold] ve tüm [gold]Kuvvet[/gold]'ini kaybeder.

translations.eng: The first time this creature's HP reaches [blue]150[/blue] or below, it becomes [gold]Stunned[/gold].
translations.zhs: 这个生物的生命值第一次下降到[blue]150[/blue]或更低时，将其[gold]击晕[/gold]。
translations.deu: Wenn die TP dieser Kreatur erstmals [blue]150[/blue] oder weniger erreichen, wird sie [gold]Betäubt[/gold].
translations.esp: La primera vez que los PV de esta criatura llegan a [blue]150[/blue] o menos, se [gold]aturdirá[/gold].
translations.fra: La première fois que cette créature passe la barre des [blue]150[/blue] PV, elle est [gold]Étourdie[/gold].
translations.ita: La prima volta che i PV di questa creatura sono pari o inferiori a [blue]150[/blue] , subisce [gold]Stordimento[/gold].
translations.jpn: このモンスターはHPが初めて[blue]150[/blue]以下になった時、[gold]スタン[/gold]する。
translations.kor: 이 생물의 체력이 처음으로 [blue]150[/blue] 이하로 떨어질 시, 대상이 [gold]기절[/gold] 상태가 됩니다.
translations.pol: To stworzenie otrzyma [gold]Ogłuszenie[/gold] i straci wszystkie pkt. [gold]Siły[/gold], gdy będzie mieć [blue]150[/blue] PŻ lub mniej (jednorazowo).
translations.ptb: Na primeira vez que os PV desta criatura atingirem [blue]150[/blue] ou menos, ela fica [gold]Atordoada[/gold].
translations.rus: [gold]Оглушается[/gold], когда ОЗ понижается до [blue]150[/blue] или меньше.
translations.spa: La primera vez que los PV de esta criatura lleguen a [blue]150[/blue] o menos, queda [gold]Aturdida[/gold].
translations.tha: ครั้งแรกที่สิ่งมีชีวิตนี้เหลือไม่เกิน [blue]150[/blue] HP มันจะ[gold]ติดสตัน[/gold]
translations.tur: Bu yaratığın CP'si ilk kez [blue]150[/blue] veya altına düştüğünde [gold]Sersemler[/gold].

name: Poison
description: At the start of {OnPlayer:your turn, lose|its turn, loses} [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP, then reduce [gold]Poison[/gold] by [blue]1[/blue].

translations.eng: Poison
translations.zhs: 中毒
translations.deu: Gift
translations.esp: Veneno
translations.fra: Poison
translations.ita: Veleno
translations.jpn: 毒
translations.ptb: Veneno
translations.spa: Veneno
translations.tha: พิษ

translations.eng: At the start of {OnPlayer:your turn, lose|its turn, loses} [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP, then reduce [gold]Poison[/gold] by [blue]1[/blue].
translations.zhs: 在{OnPlayer:你的回合|其回合}开始时失去[blue]{Amount}[/blue]点生命，然后将[gold]中毒[/gold]层数减少[blue]1[/blue]。
translations.deu: {OnPlayer:Verliere zu Beginn deines Zuges|Verliert zu Beginn des eigenen Zuges} [blue]{Amount}[/blue] TP, dann reduziert sich das [gold]Gift[/gold] um [blue]1[/blue].
translations.esp: Al comienzo de {OnPlayer:tu turno, pierdes|su turno, pierde} [blue]{Amount}[/blue] PV. Luego, se reducen los puntos de [gold]veneno[/gold] en [blue]1[/blue].
translations.fra: Au début de {OnPlayer:votre tour, perdez|son tour, perd} [blue]{Amount}[/blue] PV. Diminuez le [gold]Poison[/gold] de [blue]1[/blue].
translations.ita: All'inizio {OnPlayer:del tuo turno, perdi|del suo turno, perde} [blue]{Amount}[/blue] PV, poi [gold]Veleno[/gold] si riduce di [blue]1[/blue].
translations.jpn: {OnPlayer:自身の|敵の}ターン開始時、HPを[blue]{Amount}[/blue]失い、[gold]毒[/gold]が[blue]1[/blue]減少する。
translations.kor: {OnPlayer:내 턴 시작 시|대상의 턴 시작 시} 체력을 [blue]{Amount}[/blue] 잃고, [gold]중독[/gold]이 [blue]1[/blue] 감소합니다.
translations.pol: Na początku {OnPlayer:swojej tury utrać|swojej tury traci} [blue]{Amount}[/blue] PŻ, następnie {OnPlayer:zmniejsz|zmniejsza} [gold]Truciznę[/gold] o [blue]1[/blue] pkt.
translations.ptb: No início {OnPlayer:do seu turno, perca|de seu turno, perde} [blue]{Amount}[/blue] PV, então o [gold]Veneno[/gold] é reduzido em [blue]1[/blue].
translations.rus: {OnPlayer:Вы потеряете|Теряет} [blue]{Amount}[/blue] ОЗ в начале{OnPlayer:| своего} хода, затем [gold]яд[/gold] понизится на [blue]1[/blue].
translations.spa: Al comienzo de {OnPlayer:tu turno pierdes|su turno pierde} [blue]{Amount}[/blue] PV, luego el [gold]Veneno[/gold] se reduce en [blue]1[/blue].
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นเทิร์นของ{OnPlayer:คุณ|มัน} เสีย [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP จากนั้น[gold]พิษ[/gold]ลดลง [blue]1[/blue]

translations.eng: Poisoned creatures lose HP at the start of their turn. Each turn, Poison is reduced by [blue]1[/blue].
translations.zhs: 中毒的生物会在自身回合开始时失去生命。中毒层数每回合减少[blue]1[/blue]。
translations.deu: Vergiftete Kreaturen verlieren zu Beginn ihres Zuges TP. Jeden Zug reduziert sich das Gift um [blue]1[/blue].
translations.esp: Las criaturas envenenadas pierden PV al comienzo de su turno. En cada turno, los puntos de veneno se reducen en [blue]1[/blue].
translations.fra: Les créatures empoisonnées perdent des PV au début de leur tour. Chaque tour, le Poison diminue de [blue]1[/blue].
translations.ita: Le creature avvelenate perdono PV all'inizio del loro turno. In ogni turno, Veleno si riduce di [blue]1[/blue].
translations.jpn: [gold]毒[/gold]に侵されたモンスターはターン開始時にHPを失う。毎ターン、[gold]毒[/gold]は[blue]1[/blue]減少する。
translations.kor: 중독된 생물은 자신의 턴 시작 시 체력을 잃습니다. 매 턴마다 중독이 [blue]1[/blue] 감소합니다.
translations.pol: Zatrute stworzenia tracą PŻ na początku swojej tury. W każdej turze Trucizna zmniejsza się o [blue]1[/blue] pkt.
translations.ptb: Criaturas envenenadas perdem PV no início de seus turnos. A cada turno, o Veneno é reduzido em [blue]1[/blue].
translations.rus: Яд отнимает ОЗ в начале хода отравленного существа, затем понижается на [blue]1[/blue].
translations.spa: Las criaturas envenenadas pierden PV al comienzo de su turno. Cada turno, el Veneno se reduce en [blue]1[/blue].
translations.tha: สิ่งมีชีวิตที่ติดพิษจะเสีย HP ตอนเริ่มต้นเทิร์นของสิ่งมีชีวิตนั้น จากนั้นพิษลดลง [blue]1[/blue]
translations.tur: Zehirlenmiş yaratıklar turlarının başında CP kaybeder. Zehir, her turda [blue]1[/blue] azalır.

name: Possess Speed
description: When killed, return all stolen [gold]Dexterity[/gold] to the player.

translations.eng: Possess Speed
translations.zhs: 抢夺速度
translations.deu: Schnelligkeit aneignen
translations.esp: Eres veloz
translations.fra: Vol de Dextérité
translations.ita: Restituzione della Velocità
translations.jpn: 敏捷泥棒
translations.ptb: Possessão de Velocidade
translations.spa: Robo de destreza

translations.eng: When killed, return all stolen [gold]Dexterity[/gold] to the player.
translations.zhs: 被击杀时，将偷窃的所有[gold]敏捷[/gold]返还给玩家。
translations.deu: Wenn getötet, bekommt der Spieler alle gestohlene [gold]Geschicklichkeit[/gold] zurück.
translations.esp: Al morir, devuelve toda la [gold]destreza[/gold] robada.
translations.fra: Lorsque cette créature périt, la [gold]Dextérité[/gold] volée au joueur est restituée.
translations.ita: Quando muore, restituisce tutta la [gold]Destrezza[/gold] rubata al giocatore.
translations.jpn: 倒された時、盗んだ[gold]敏捷[/gold]をすべてプレイヤーに返す。
translations.kor: 처치 시, 빼앗은 모든 [gold]민첩[/gold]이 플레이어에게 돌아갑니다.
translations.pol: Po zabiciu zwraca graczowi wszystkie ukradzione pkt. [gold]Zręczności[/gold].
translations.ptb: Quando esta criatura é derrotada, retorna toda a [gold]Destreza[/gold] roubada.
translations.spa: Al morir, devuelve toda la [gold]Destreza[/gold] robada.
translations.tha: เมื่อถูกฆ่า คืน[gold]ความชำนาญ[/gold]ทั้งหมดที่ขโมยไปจากผู้เล่น
translations.tur: Öldürüldüğünde, çalınan tüm [gold]Beceriklilik[/gold] oyuncuya geri döner.

translations.eng: When killed, return all stolen [gold]Dexterity[/gold] to the player.
translations.zhs: 被击杀时，将偷窃的所有[gold]敏捷[/gold]返还给玩家。
translations.deu: Wenn getötet, bekommt der Spieler alle gestohlene [gold]Geschicklichkeit[/gold] zurück.
translations.esp: Al morir, devuelve toda la [gold]destreza[/gold] robada.
translations.fra: Lorsque cette créature périt, toute la [gold]Dextérité[/gold] volée au joueur est restituée.
translations.ita: Quando muore, restituisce tutta la [gold]Destrezza[/gold] rubata al giocatore.
translations.jpn: 倒された時、盗んだ[gold]敏捷[/gold]をすべてプレイヤーに返す。
translations.kor: 처치 시, 빼앗은 모든 [gold]민첩[/gold]이 플레이어에게 돌아갑니다.
translations.pol: Po zabiciu zwraca graczowi wszystkie ukradzione pkt. [gold]Zręczności[/gold].

translations.eng: When an enemy dies, Corpse Slug immediately eats it, becoming [gold]Stunned[/gold] and gaining [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
translations.zhs: 当有敌人死亡时，噬尸蛞蝓会立即吃下尸体，在本回合被[gold]击晕[/gold]然后获得[blue]{Amount}[/blue]点[gold]力量[/gold]。
translations.deu: Wenn ein Gegner stirbt, frisst Leichenschnecke ihn sofort, wird dadurch [gold]Betäubt[/gold] und erhält [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Stärke[/gold].
translations.esp: Si un enemigo muere, Putribabosa se lo comerá de inmediato, se [gold]aturdirá[/gold] y obtendrá [blue]{Amount}[/blue] de [gold]fuerza[/gold].
translations.fra: Lorsqu'un ennemi périt, Putrilimace le dévore. Elle est [gold]Étourdie[/gold] et gagne [blue]{Amount}[/blue] de [gold]Force[/gold].
translations.ita: Quando un nemico muore, la Lumaca cadaverica lo mangia immediatamente, subendo [gold]Stordimento[/gold] e ottenendo [blue]{Amount}[/blue] di [gold]Forza[/gold].
translations.jpn: 敵が死んだ時、屍ナメクジは即座にそれを食べ、[gold]スタン[/gold]して[gold]筋力[/gold][blue]{Amount}[/blue]を得る。
translations.kor: 적이 사망 시, 시체 민달팽이가 그 적을 즉시 먹어치우며 [gold]기절[/gold] 상태가 되고, [gold]힘[/gold]을 [blue]{Amount}[/blue] 얻습니다.
translations.pol: Gdy inny przeciwnik umrze, Ślimak Trupojad od razu go zjada. Otrzymuje [gold]Ogłuszenie[/gold] i [blue]{Amount}[/blue] pkt. [gold]Siły[/gold].
translations.ptb: Quando um inimigo morre, Lesma Necrófaga o devora imediatamente, ficando [gold]Atordoada[/gold] e recebendo [blue]{Amount}[/blue] de [gold]Força[/gold].
translations.rus: Слизень-падальщик сразу съедает погибающих союзников, получая [gold]оглушение[/gold] и [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]силы[/gold].
translations.spa: Cuando un enemigo muere, la Babosa Cadavérica se lo come de inmediato, quedando [gold]Aturdida[/gold] y ganando [blue]{Amount}[/blue] de [gold]Fuerza[/gold].
translations.tha: เมื่อมีศัตรูตาย ทากศพจะกินมันทันที จะ[gold]ติดสตัน[/gold]และได้รับ [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]ความแข็งแรง[/gold]
translations.tur: Bir düşman öldüğünde Ceset Yiyen Sümüklü Böcek onu hemen yer, [gold]Sersemler[/gold] ve [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Kuvvet[/gold] kazanır.

translations.eng: When an enemy dies, Corpse Slug immediately eats it, becoming [gold]Stunned[/gold] and gaining [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
translations.zhs: 当有敌人死亡时，噬尸蛞蝓会立即吃下尸体，在本回合被[gold]击晕[/gold]然后获得[blue]1[/blue]点[gold]力量[/gold]。
translations.deu: Wenn ein Gegner stirbt, frisst Leichenschnecke ihn sofort, wird dadurch [gold]Betäubt[/gold] und erhält [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Stärke[/gold].
translations.esp: Si un enemigo muere, Putribabosa se lo comerá de inmediato, se [gold]aturdirá[/gold] y obtendrá [blue]1[/blue] de [gold]fuerza[/gold].
translations.fra: Lorsqu'un ennemi périt, Putrilimace le dévore. Elle est [gold]Étourdie[/gold] et gagne [blue]1[/blue] de [gold]Force[/gold].
translations.ita: Quando un nemico muore, la Lumaca cadaverica lo mangia immediatamente, subendo [gold]Stordimento[/gold] e ottenendo [blue]1[/blue] di [gold]Forza[/gold].
translations.jpn: 敵が死んだ時、屍ナメクジは即座にそれを食べ、[gold]スタン[/gold]して[gold]筋力[/gold][blue]1[/blue]を得る。
translations.kor: 적이 사망 시, 시체 민달팽이가 그 적을 즉시 먹어치우며 [gold]기절[/gold] 상태가 되고, [gold]힘[/gold]을 [blue]1[/blue] 얻습니다.
translations.pol: Gdy przeciwnik umrze, Ślimak Trupojad od razu go zjada. Zostaje [gold]Ogłuszony[/gold] i otrzymuje [blue]1[/blue] pkt. [gold]Siły[/gold].
translations.ptb: Quando um inimigo morre, Lesma Necrófaga o devora imediatamente, ficando [gold]Atordoada[/gold] e recebendo [blue]1[/blue] de [gold]Força[/gold].
translations.rus: Слизень-падальщик сразу съедает погибающих союзников, получая [gold]оглушение[/gold] и [blue]1[/blue] [gold]силы[/gold].
translations.spa: Cuando un enemigo muere, la Babosa Cadavérica se lo come de inmediato, quedando [gold]Aturdida[/gold] y ganando [blue]1[/blue] de [gold]Fuerza[/gold].
translations.tha: เมื่อมีศัตรูตาย ทากศพจะกินมันทันที จะ[gold]ติดสตัน[/gold]และได้รับ [blue]1[/blue] [gold]ความแข็งแรง[/gold]
translations.tur: Bir düşman öldüğünde, Ceset Yiyen Sümüklü Böcek onu hemen yer, [gold]Sersemler[/gold] ve [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Kuvvet[/gold] kazanır.

name: Reaper Form
description: Whenever Attacks deal damage, they also apply {Amount:plural:|[blue]{}[/blue] times }that much [gold]Doom[/gold].

translations.eng: Reaper Form
translations.zhs: 死神形态
translations.deu: Schnitterform
translations.esp: Forma segadora
translations.fra: Forme de la Faucheuse
translations.ita: Forma Mietitrice
translations.jpn: 死神化
translations.ptb: Forma Ceifadora
translations.spa: Forma de Segadora
translations.tha: ร่างยมทูต

translations.eng: Whenever Attacks deal damage, they also apply {Amount:plural:|[blue]{}[/blue] times }that much [gold]Doom[/gold].
translations.zhs: 每当你的攻击造成伤害时，同时给予{Amount:choose(1):等量的|[blue]其{}[/blue]倍的}[gold]灾厄[/gold]。
translations.deu: Wenn Angriffe Schaden zufügen, wenden sie {Amount:plural:ebenso viel|[blue]{}[/blue] Mal so viel} [gold]Verderben[/gold] an.
translations.esp: Si una carta de ataque inflige daño, también aplica {Amount:plural:|[blue]{}[/blue] veces} esa cantidad de [gold]condena[/gold].
translations.fra: Lorsqu'une Attaque inflige des dégâts, elle applique {Amount:plural:le même montant|[blue]{}[/blue] fois ce montant} de [gold]Fatalité[/gold].
translations.ita: Ogni volta che le carte Attacco infliggono danno, applicano anche la stessa quantità di [gold]Condanna[/gold] moltiplicata per {Amount:plural:|[blue]{}[/blue]}.
translations.jpn: アタックでダメージを与えるたび、そのダメージの[blue]{Amount}[/blue]倍の[gold]破滅[/gold]を付与する。
translations.kor: 공격 카드로 피해를 줄 때마다, {Amount:choose(1):피해량과 동일한|피해량의 [blue]{}[/blue]배} 만큼의 [gold]종말[/gold]을 부여합니다.
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek zadasz obrażenia od Ataków, nałóż tyle samo pkt. [gold]Zagłady[/gold] {Amount:plural:|[blue]{}[/blue] razy|[blue]{}[/blue] razy}.
translations.ptb: Sempre que Ataques causarem dano, eles também aplicam {Amount:plural:a mesma quantidade|[blue]{}[/blue] vezes esta quantidade} de [gold]Ruína[/gold].
translations.rus: Атаки накладывают [gold]злой рок[/gold]{Amount:plural(ru):, равный нанесенному| [blue]в {} раза[/blue]| [blue]в {} раз[/blue] больше нанесенного} по ОЗ цели {Amount:plural(ru):урону|урона|урона}.
translations.spa: Cuando los Ataques infligen daño, también aplican {Amount:plural:la misma cantidad|[blue]{}[/blue] veces esa cantidad} de [gold]Condena[/gold].
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่สร้างความเสียหายจากการโจมตี สร้าง[gold]อายุขัย[/gold]{Amount:choose(1):ตาม| [blue]{}[/blue] เท่าของ}จำนวนนั้นด้วย
translations.tur: Saldırılar hasar verdiğinde, verdikleri {Amount:plural:hasar|hasarın [blue]{}[/blue] katı} kadar [gold]Kader[/gold] de uygular.

translations.eng: Whenever Attacks deal damage, they also apply that much [gold]Doom[/gold].
translations.zhs: 每当你的攻击造成伤害时，同时给予等量的[gold]灾厄[/gold]。
translations.deu: Wenn Angriffe Schaden zufügen, wenden sie ebenso viel [gold]Verderben[/gold] an.
translations.esp: Si una carta de ataque inflige daño, también aplica la misma cantidad de [gold]condena[/gold].
translations.fra: Lorsqu'une Attaque inflige des dégâts, elle applique le même montant de [gold]Fatalité[/gold].
translations.ita: Ogni volta che una carta Attacco infligge danno, applica anche la stessa quantità di [gold]Condanna[/gold].
translations.jpn: アタックでダメージを与えるたび、そのダメージと同じ値の[gold]破滅[/gold]を付与する。
translations.kor: 공격 카드로 피해를 줄 때마다, 그와 동일한 만큼의 [gold]종말[/gold]을 부여합니다.
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek zadasz obrażenia od Ataków, nałóż tyle samo pkt. [gold]Zagłady[/gold].
translations.ptb: Sempre que Ataques causarem dano, eles também aplicam a mesma quantidade de [gold]Ruína[/gold].
translations.rus: Атаки накладывают [gold]злой рок[/gold], равный нанесенному по ОЗ цели урону.
translations.spa: Cuando los Ataques infligen daño, también aplican la misma cantidad de [gold]Condena[/gold].
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่สร้างความเสียหายจากการโจมตี สร้าง[gold]อายุขัย[/gold]ตามจำนวนนั้นด้วย
translations.tur: Saldırılar hasar verdiğinde, verdikleri hasar kadar [gold]Kader[/gold] de uygular.

name: Reattach
description: If other segments are still alive, revives in [blue]2[/blue] turns with [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP.

translations.eng: Reattach
translations.zhs: 接续
translations.deu: Wiederanwachsen
translations.esp: Refragmentación
translations.fra: Reconnexion
translations.ita: Ricomposizione
translations.jpn: 再結合
translations.ptb: Reconectar
translations.spa: Reconexión

translations.eng: If other segments are still alive, revives in [blue]2[/blue] turns with [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP.
translations.zhs: 如果身体还有存活的其他部分，则在[blue]2[/blue]回合后以[blue]{Amount}[/blue]点生命复活。
translations.deu: Falls noch andere Segmente am Leben sind, wird es nach [blue]2[/blue] Zügen mit [blue]{Amount}[/blue] TP wiederbelebt.
translations.esp: Si otros fragmentos permanecen con vida, revive en [blue]2[/blue] turnos con [blue]{Amount}[/blue] PV.
translations.fra: Se régénère au bout de [blue]2[/blue] tours avec [blue]{Amount}[/blue] PV si un autre tronçon est encore en vie.
translations.ita: Se le altre parti sono ancora vive, rinasce tra [blue]2[/blue] turni con [blue]{Amount}[/blue] PV.
translations.jpn: 他の節がまだ生きていれば、[blue]2[/blue]ターン後にHP[blue]{Amount}[/blue]で復活する。
translations.kor: 다른 부위가 살아있다면, [blue]2[/blue]턴 후에 [blue]{Amount}[/blue]의 체력으로 부활합니다.
translations.pol: Jeżeli pozostałe części ciała są żywe, odradza się za [blue]2[/blue] tury z [blue]{Amount}[/blue] PŻ.
translations.ptb: Se outros segmentos estiverem vivos, revive em [blue]2[/blue] turnos com [blue]{Amount}[/blue] PV.
translations.rus: Воскресает через [blue]2[/blue] хода с [blue]{Amount}[/blue] ОЗ, если хотя бы один сегмент жив.
translations.spa: Si otro de los segmentos sigue vivo, revive en [blue]2[/blue] turnos con [blue]{Amount}[/blue] PV.
translations.tha: ถ้าส่วนอื่นยังมีชีวิตอยู่ จะฟื้นคืนชีพในอีก [blue]2[/blue] เทิร์นโดยมี [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP
translations.tur: Diğer parçalar hâlâ hayattaysa, [blue]2[/blue] tur sonra [blue]{Amount}[/blue] CP ile yeniden dirilir.

translations.eng: If other segments are still alive, revives in [blue]2[/blue] turns with [blue]25[/blue] HP.
translations.zhs: 如果身体还有存活的其他部分，则在[blue]2[/blue]回合后以[blue]25[/blue]点生命复活。
translations.deu: Falls noch andere Segmente am Leben sind, wird es nach [blue]2[/blue] Zügen mit [blue]25[/blue] TP wiederbelebt.
translations.esp: Si otros fragmentos permanecen con vida, revive en [blue]2[/blue] turnos con [blue]25[/blue] PV.
translations.fra: Se régénère au bout de [blue]2[/blue] tours avec [blue]25[/blue] PV si un autre tronçon est encore en vie.
translations.ita: Se le altre parti sono ancora vive, rinasce tra [blue]2[/blue] turni con [blue]25[/blue] PV.
translations.jpn: 他の節がまだ生きていれば、[blue]2[/blue]ターン後にHP[blue]25[/blue]で復活する。
translations.kor: 다른 부위가 살아있다면, [blue]2[/blue]턴 후에 [blue]25[/blue]의 체력으로 부활합니다.
translations.pol: Jeżeli pozostałe części ciała są żywe, odradza się za [blue]2[/blue] tury z [blue]25[/blue] PŻ.
translations.ptb: Se outros segmentos estiverem vivos, revive em [blue]2[/blue] turnos com [blue]25[/blue] PV.
translations.rus: Воскресает через [blue]2[/blue] хода с [blue]25[/blue] ОЗ, если хотя бы один сегмент жив.
translations.spa: Si otro de los segmentos sigue vivo, revive en [blue]2[/blue] turnos con [blue]25[/blue] PV.
translations.tha: ถ้าส่วนอื่นยังมีชีวิตอยู่ จะฟื้นคืนชีพในอีก [blue]2[/blue] เทิร์นโดยมี [blue]25[/blue] HP
translations.tur: Diğer parçalar hâlâ hayattaysa, [blue]2[/blue] tur sonra [blue]25[/blue] CP ile yeniden dirilir.

name: Rebound
description: The next {Amount:plural:card|[blue]{}[/blue] cards} you play this turn {Amount:plural:is|are} placed on the top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].

translations.eng: Rebound
translations.zhs: 弹回
translations.deu: Rückstoß
translations.esp: Rebote
translations.fra: Rebond
translations.ita: Recupero
translations.jpn: リバウンド
translations.ptb: Rebote
translations.spa: Rebote
translations.tha: ดีดกลับ

translations.eng: The next {Amount:plural:card|[blue]{}[/blue] cards} you play this turn {Amount:plural:is|are} placed on the top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
translations.zhs: 将你在本回合打出的下[blue]{Amount}[/blue]张牌放置到你的[gold]抽牌堆[/gold]顶部。
translations.deu: Die nächste {Amount:plural: Karte|n [blue]{}[/blue] Karten}, die du in diesem Zug spielst, {Amount:plural:wird|werden} oben auf deinen [gold]Nachziehstapel[/gold] gelegt.
translations.esp: {Amount:plural:La próxima carta|Las próximas [blue]{}[/blue] cartas} que jueges en este turno {Amount:plural:se colocará|se colocarán} en la parte superior del [gold]mazo de robo[/gold].
translations.fra: {Amount:plural:La prochaine carte|Les [blue]{}[/blue] prochaines cartes} que vous jouez ce tour {Amount:plural:est placée|sont placées} sur le dessus de votre [gold]Pioche[/gold].
translations.ita: {Amount:plural:La carta successiva|Le [blue]{}[/blue] carte successive} che giochi in questo turno {Amount:plural:viene posizionata|vengono posizionate} in cima al tuo [gold]mazzo di pesca[/gold].
translations.jpn: このターン、次にプレイする[blue]{Amount}[/blue]枚のカードを[gold]山札[/gold]の一番上に置く。
translations.kor: 이번 턴에 다음으로 사용하는 {Amount:choose(1):카드를|카드 [blue]{}[/blue]장을} [gold]뽑을 카드 더미[/gold] 맨 위에 놓습니다.
translations.pol: Umieść {Amount:plural:następną kartę zagraną|następne [blue]{}[/blue] karty zagrane|następnych [blue]{}[/blue] kart zagranych} w tej turze na szczycie [gold]stosu rozgrywającego[/gold].
translations.ptb: {Amount:plural:A próxima carta|As próximas [blue]{}[/blue] cartas} que você jogar neste turno {Amount:plural:é colocada|são colocadas} no topo da sua [gold]Pilha de Compra[/gold].
translations.rus: Кладет {Amount:plural(ru):следующую разыгранную карту|следующие [blue]{}[/blue] разыгранные карты|следующие [blue]{}[/blue] разыгранных карт} на верх [gold]стопки добора[/gold].
translations.spa: {Amount:plural:La siguiente carta|Las siguientes [blue]{}[/blue] cartas} que juegues este turno se {Amount:plural:coloca|colocan} en la parte superior de tu [gold]Pila de robo[/gold].
translations.tha: นำการ์ด{Amount:choose(1):| [blue]{}[/blue] }ใบถัดไปที่คุณเล่นในเทิร์นนี้ไปไว้บนสุดของ[gold]กองจั่ว[/gold]
translations.tur: Bu tur sonraki oynayacağın {Amount:plural:kart|[blue]{}[/blue] kart}, [gold]Çekme Deste[/gold]'nin en üstüne {Amount:plural:koyulur|koyulur}.

translations.eng: The next card you play this turn is placed on the top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
translations.zhs: 将你在本回合打出的下一张牌放置到你的[gold]抽牌堆[/gold]顶部。
translations.deu: Die nächste Karte, die du in diesem Zug spielst, wird oben auf deinen [gold]Nachziehstapel[/gold] gelegt.
translations.esp: La próxima carta que juegues en este turno se colocará en la parte superior del [gold]mazo de robo[/gold].
translations.fra: La prochaine carte que vous jouez ce tour est placée sur le dessus de votre [gold]Pioche[/gold].
translations.ita: La carta successiva che giochi in questo turno viene posizionata in cima al tuo [gold]mazzo di pesca[/gold].
translations.jpn: このターン、次にプレイするカードを[gold]山札[/gold]の一番上に置く。
translations.kor: 이번 턴에 다음으로 사용하는 카드를 [gold]뽑을 카드 더미[/gold] 맨 위에 놓습니다.
translations.pol: Umieść następną kartę zagraną w tej turze na szczycie [gold]stosu rozgrywającego[/gold].
translations.ptb: A próxima carta que você jogar neste turno é colocada no topo da sua [gold]Pilha de Compra[/gold].
translations.rus: Следующая разыгранная карта кладется на верх [gold]стопки добора[/gold].
translations.spa: La siguiente carta que juegues este turno se coloca en la parte superior de tu [gold]Pila de robo[/gold].
translations.tha: นำการ์ดใบถัดไปที่คุณเล่นไปไว้บนสุดของ[gold]กองจั่ว[/gold]
translations.tur: Bu tur sonraki oynayacağın kart, [gold]Çekme Deste[/gold]'nin en üstüne koyulur.

name: Reflect
description: Blocked damage is reflected to your attacker for [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:turn|turns}.

translations.eng: Reflect
translations.zhs: 倒映
translations.deu: Reflektieren
translations.esp: Reflejo
translations.fra: Armure réfléchissante
translations.ita: Riflesso
translations.jpn: 反射
translations.ptb: Refletir
translations.spa: Reflejo

translations.eng: Blocked damage is reflected to your attacker for [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:turn|turns}.
translations.zhs: [blue]{Amount}[/blue]回合内，被格挡的伤害会反弹到攻击者身上。
translations.deu: Geblockter Schaden wird auf deinen Angreifer für [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:Zug|Züge} zurückgeworfen.
translations.esp: Reflejas el daño bloqueado en su atacante durante [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:turno|turnos}.
translations.fra: Les dégâts bloqués avec de l'Armure sont réfléchis contre l'attaquant (dure [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:tour|tours}).
translations.ita: Il danno bloccato viene rispedito a chi ha sferrato l'attacco per [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:turno|turni}.
translations.jpn: [blue]{Amount}[/blue]ターンの間、ブロックしたダメージを攻撃者に跳ね返す。
translations.kor: 다음 [blue]{Amount}[/blue]턴 동안 막은 피해가 공격한 적에게 반사됩니다.
translations.pol: Zablokowane obrażenia są odbijane na atakującego przez [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:turę|tury|tur}.
translations.ptb: Dano bloqueado é refletido ao atacante por [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:turno|turnos}.
translations.rus: Урон, от которого вы [gold]защищаетесь[/gold], {Amount:plural(ru):в этом ходу|в течение [blue]{}[/blue] ходов|в течение [blue]{}[/blue] ходов} наносится врагу.
translations.spa: El daño bloqueado se devuelve al atacante durante [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:turno|turnos}.
translations.tha: สะท้อนความเสียหายที่บล็อกได้กลับไปหาผู้โจมตี เป็นเวลา [blue]{Amount}[/blue] เทิร์น

translations.eng: Blocked damage is reflected to your attacker.
translations.zhs: 被格挡的伤害会反弹到攻击者身上。

translations.esp: Reflejas el daño bloqueado en su atacante.

translations.pol: Zablokowane obrażenia są odbijane na atakującego.

name: Regen
description: At the end of your turn, heal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP, then reduce [gold]Regen[/gold] by [blue]1[/blue].

translations.eng: Regen
translations.zhs: 再生
translations.deu: Erholen
translations.esp: Regeneración
translations.fra: Régénération
translations.ita: Rigenerazione
translations.jpn: 再生
translations.ptb: Regeneração
translations.spa: Regeneración
translations.tha: การฟื้นพลัง

translations.eng: At the end of your turn, heal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP, then reduce [gold]Regen[/gold] by [blue]1[/blue].
translations.zhs: 在你的回合结束时回复[blue]{Amount}[/blue]点生命，然后将[gold]再生[/gold]减少[blue]1[/blue]。
translations.deu: Heile am Ende deines Zuges [blue]{Amount}[/blue] TP, dann reduziere [gold]Erholen[/gold] um [blue]1[/blue].
translations.esp: Al final del turno, recupera [blue]{Amount}[/blue] PV. Luego, [gold]regeneración[/gold] se reduce en [blue]1[/blue].
translations.fra: À la fin de votre tour, vous récupérez [blue]{Amount}[/blue] PV, puis [gold]Régénération[/gold] diminue de [blue]1[/blue].
translations.ita: Al termine del tuo turno, recuperi [blue]{Amount}[/blue] PV, poi [gold]Rigenerazione[/gold] si riduce di [blue]1[/blue].
translations.jpn: ターン終了時、HPを[blue]{Amount}[/blue]回復し、[gold]再生[/gold]が[blue]1[/blue]減少する。
translations.kor: 내 턴 종료 시, 체력을 [blue]{Amount}[/blue] 회복하고, [gold]재생[/gold]이 [blue]1[/blue] 감소합니다.

translations.rus: [gold]Регенерация[/gold] восполняет ОЗ в конце хода, затем понижается на [blue]1[/blue].
translations.spa: La [gold]Regeneración[/gold] cura tus PV al final de tu turno. Cada turno, la [gold]Regeneración[/gold] se reduce en [blue]1[/blue].

translations.eng: The first time [gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold] HP reaches [blue]{Amount}[/blue] or below, it becomes [gold]Stunned[/gold].
translations.zhs: [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold]的生命值第一次降到[blue]{Amount}[/blue]或以下时，会被[gold]击晕[/gold]。
translations.deu: Wenn die TP von [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] zum ersten Mal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] oder weniger erreichen, wird er [gold]Betäubt[/gold].
translations.esp: La primera vez que los PV de [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] lleguen a [blue]{Amount}[/blue] o menos, se [gold]aturdirá[/gold].
translations.fra: La première fois que [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] passe la barre des [blue]{Amount}[/blue] PV, elle est [gold]Étourdie[/gold].
translations.ita: La prima volta che i PV di [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] sono pari o inferiori a [blue]{Amount}[/blue], subisce [gold]Stordimento[/gold].
translations.jpn: [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold]のHPが初めて[blue]{Amount}[/blue]以下になった時、[gold]スタン[/gold]する。
translations.kor: [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold]의 체력이 처음으로 [blue]{Amount}[/blue] 이하로 떨어질 시, 대상이 [gold]기절[/gold] 상태가 됩니다.
translations.pol: [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] otrzyma [gold]Ogłuszenie[/gold], gdy będzie mieć [blue]{Amount}[/blue] PŻ lub mniej (jednorazowo).
translations.ptb: Na primeira vez que os PV de [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] chegarem a [blue]{Amount}[/blue] ou menos, esta criatura fica [gold]Atordoada[/gold].
translations.rus: [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] [gold]оглушается[/gold], когда ОЗ понижается до [blue]{Amount}[/blue] или ниже первый раз за бой.
translations.spa: La primera vez que los PV de [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] lleguen a [blue]{Amount}[/blue] o menos, se [gold]Aturde[/gold].
translations.tha: ครั้งแรกที่[gold]{OwnerName}[/gold]เหลือ HP ไม่เกิน [blue]{Amount}[/blue] มันจะ[gold]ติดสตัน[/gold]
translations.tur: [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold], CP'si ilk kez [blue]{Amount}[/blue] veya altına düştüğünde [gold]Sersemler[/gold].

translations.eng: The first time this creature's HP reaches [blue]50%[/blue] or below, it becomes [gold]Stunned[/gold].
translations.zhs: 这个生物的生命值第一次降到[blue]50%[/blue]或以下时，会被[gold]击晕[/gold]。
translations.deu: Wenn die TP dieser Kreatur zum ersten Mal [blue]50%[/blue] oder weniger erreichen, wird sie [gold]Betäubt[/gold].
translations.esp: La primera vez que los PV de esta criatura lleguen a [blue]50 %[/blue] o menos, se [gold]aturdirá[/gold].
translations.fra: La première fois que cette créature passe la barre des [blue]50%[/blue] de PV, elle est [gold]Étourdie[/gold].
translations.ita: La prima volta che i PV di questa creatura sono pari o inferiori al [blue]50%[/blue], subisce [gold]Stordimento[/gold].
translations.jpn: このモンスターはHPが初めて[blue]50%[/blue]以下になった時、[gold]スタン[/gold]する。
translations.kor: 이 생물의 체력이 처음으로 [blue]50%[/blue] 이하로 떨어질 시, 대상이 [gold]기절[/gold] 상태가 됩니다.
translations.pol: To stworzenie otrzyma [gold]Ogłuszenie[/gold], gdy będzie mieć [blue]50%[/blue] PŻ lub mniej (jednorazowo).
translations.ptb: Na primeira vez que os PV desta criatura alcançarem [blue]50%[/blue] ou menos, ela fica [gold]Atordoada[/gold].
translations.rus: [gold]Оглушается[/gold], когда ОЗ понижается до [blue]50%[/blue] или меньше первый раз за бой.
translations.spa: La primera vez que los PV de esta criatura lleguen al [blue]50 %[/blue] o menos, queda [gold]Aturdida[/gold].
translations.tha: ครั้งแรกที่สิ่งมีชีวิตนี้เหลือ HP ไม่เกิน [blue]50%[/blue] มันจะ[gold]ติดสตัน[/gold]
translations.tur: Bu yaratığın CP'si ilk kez [blue]%50[/blue] veya altına düştüğünde [gold]Sersemler[/gold].

translations.esp: {ApplierName.StringValue:cond:Mientras {} permanezca con vida, tus cartas de ataque|los ataques de [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold]} infligirán un [blue]{DamageDecrease} %[/blue] menos de daño{Amount:cond:==1? en el próximo turno|>1? durante los próximos [blue]{}[/blue] turnos|}.
translations.fra: {ApplierName.StringValue:cond:tant que {} est en vie, vos Attaques|Les Attaques de [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold]} infligent [blue]{DamageDecrease}%[/blue] de dégâts en moins{Amount:cond:==1? au prochain tour|>1? pendant les [blue]{}[/blue] prochains tours|}.
translations.ita: {ApplierName.StringValue:cond:Finché {} è in vita, le tue carte Attacco|le carte Attacco di [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold]} infliggono un [blue]{DamageDecrease}%[/blue] di danno in meno{Amount:cond:==1? nel prossimo turno|>1? nei prossimi [blue]{}[/blue] turni|}.
translations.jpn: {ApplierName.StringValue:cond:{}が生存中、あなたの|[gold]{OwnerName}[/gold]の}アタックダメージが[blue]{DamageDecrease}%[/blue]減少する{Amount:cond:==1?（次のターンまで）|>1?（残り[blue]{Amount}[/blue]ターン）|}。
translations.kor: {Amount:cond:==1?다음 턴에 |>1?다음 [blue]{}[/blue] 턴 동안, |}{ApplierName.StringValue:cond:{}가 살아있는 동안, 내가|[gold]{OwnerName}가[/gold]} 가하는 공격의 피해량이 [blue]{DamageDecrease}%[/blue] 감소합니다.
translations.pol: {ApplierName.StringValue:cond:Jeśli {} żyje, twoje Ataki zadają [blue]{DamageDecrease}%[/blue] mniej obrażeń|[gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] zadaje [blue]{DamageDecrease}%[/blue] mniej obrażeń od ataków}{Amount:cond:==1? w tej turze|>1? przez następującą liczbę tur: [blue]{}[/blue]|}.
translations.ptb: {ApplierName.StringValue:cond:Enquanto {} estiver vivo, os seus Ataques|Os Ataques de [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold]} causam [blue]{DamageDecrease}%[/blue] menos dano{Amount:cond:==1? no próximo turno|>1? pelos próximos [blue]{}[/blue] turnos|}.
translations.rus: {ApplierName.StringValue:cond:Пока {} остается на поле боя, вы наносите|[gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] наносит} на [blue]{DamageDecrease}%[/blue] меньше урона{Amount:cond:==1? в этом ходу|>1? в течение [blue]{}[/blue] ходов|}.
translations.spa: {ApplierName.StringValue:cond:Mientras {} viva, tus Ataques|Los Ataques de [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold]} infligen un [blue]{DamageDecrease} %[/blue] menos de daño{Amount:cond:==1? durante el siguiente turno|>1? durante los siguientes [blue]{}[/blue] turnos|}.
translations.tha: {ApplierName.StringValue:cond:ขณะที่{}ยังมีชีวิตอยู่ การโจมตีของคุณ|การโจมตีของ [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] }สร้างความเสียหายลดลง [blue]{DamageDecrease}%[/blue]{Amount:cond:==1? ในเทิร์นถัดไป|>1? เป็นเวลา [blue]{}[/blue] เทิร์น|}
translations.tur: {ApplierName.StringValue:cond: {} hayatteyken, sana ait|[gold]{OwnerName} tarafından yapılan[/gold]} Saldırılar,{Amount:cond:==1? sonraki turda|>1? sonraki [blue]{}[/blue] turda|} [blue]%{DamageDecrease}[/blue] daha az hasar verir.

translations.eng: This creature's Attacks deal [blue]30%[/blue] less damage for the next 3 turns.
translations.zhs: 这个生物的攻击伤害在3回合内减少[blue]30%[/blue]。
translations.deu: Die Angriffe dieser Kreatur fügen für die nächsten 3 Züge [blue]30%[/blue] weniger Schaden zu.

translations.fra: Les Attaques de cette créature infligent [blue]30%[/blue] de dégâts en moins pendant les 3 tours suivants.
translations.ita: Gli attacchi di questa creatura infliggono il [blue]30%[/blue] di danno in meno per i 3 turni successivi.
translations.jpn: 次の3ターンの間、このモンスターはアタックダメージが[blue]30%[/blue]減少する。
translations.kor: 다음 3턴 동안 이 생물이 가하는 공격의 피해량이 [blue]30%[/blue] 감소합니다.
translations.pol: To stworzenie zadaje [blue]30%[/blue] mniej obrażeń od ataków przez 3 następne tury.
translations.ptb: Os ataques desta criatura causam [blue]30%[/blue] menos dano pelos próximos 3 turnos.
translations.rus: Понижает наносимый урон на [blue]30%[/blue] на 3 хода.
translations.spa: Los Ataques de esta criatura infligen un [blue]30 %[/blue] menos de daño durante los siguientes 3 turnos.
translations.tha: สิ่งมีชีวิตนี้สร้างความเสียหายจากการโจมตีลดลง [blue]30%[/blue] เป็นเวลา 3 เทิร์น
translations.tur: Bu yaratığın Saldırıları sonraki 3 tur boyunca [blue]%30[/blue] daha az hasar verir.

name: Shroud
description: Whenever you apply [gold]Doom[/gold], gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].

translations.eng: Shroud
translations.zhs: 厄运之衣
translations.deu: Leichentuch
translations.esp: Velo protector

translations.ita: Velo
translations.jpn: 影の衣

translations.spa: Mortaja

translations.eng: Whenever you apply [gold]Doom[/gold], gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
translations.zhs: 你每次给予[gold]灾厄[/gold]时，获得[blue]{Amount}[/blue]点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
translations.deu: Wenn du [gold]Verderben[/gold] anwendest, erhalte [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
translations.esp: Al aplicar [gold]condena[/gold], brinda [blue]{Amount}[/blue] de [gold]bloqueo[/gold].
translations.fra: Lorsque vous appliquez de la [gold]Fatalité[/gold], gagnez [blue]{Amount}[/blue] d'[gold]Armure[/gold].
translations.ita: Ogni volta che applichi [gold]Condanna[/gold], ottieni [blue]{Amount}[/blue] di [gold]Blocco[/gold].
translations.jpn: [gold]破滅[/gold]を付与するたび、[blue]{Amount}[/blue][gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。
translations.ptb: Sempre que você aplicar [gold]Ruína[/gold], receba [blue]{Amount}[/blue] de [gold]Proteção[/gold].
translations.spa: Cuando apliques [gold]Condena[/gold], gana [blue]{Amount}[/blue] de [gold]Bloqueo[/gold].
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณสร้าง[gold]อายุขัย[/gold] ได้รับ [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]บล็อก[/gold]

name: Sic 'Em
description: Whenever [gold]Osty[/gold] hits this enemy this turn, [gold]Summon[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue].

translations.eng: Sic 'Em
translations.zhs: 紧追不放
translations.deu: Auf sie
translations.esp: ¡Ataca!
translations.fra: À l'attaque !
translations.ita: All'Attacco!
translations.jpn: やっちゃえ
translations.ptb: Avance!
translations.spa: ¡Ataca!

translations.eng: Whenever [gold]Osty[/gold] hits this enemy this turn, [gold]Summon[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
translations.zhs: 本回合，每当[gold]奥斯提[/gold]命中这个敌人时，[gold]召唤[/gold][blue]{Amount}[/blue]。
translations.deu: Wenn [gold]Osty[/gold] in diesem Zug diesen Gegner trifft, [gold]Beschwöre[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
translations.esp: Si [gold]Puro Hueso[/gold] golpea a este enemigo en este turno, aplica [gold]invocación[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
translations.fra: Lorsque [gold]Titos[/gold] touche cet ennemi pendant ce tour, [gold]Invoquez[/gold] pour [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
translations.ita: Ogni volta che [gold]Osty[/gold] colpisce questo nemico in questo turno, applichi [blue]{Amount}[/blue] di [gold]Invocazione[/gold].
translations.jpn: このターン、[gold]オスティ[/gold]がこの敵を攻撃するたび、[gold]召喚[/gold][blue]{Amount}[/blue]。
translations.kor: 이번 턴에 [gold]골골이[/gold]가 이 적을 공격할 때마다, [gold]소환[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek [gold]Kostek[/gold] uderzy tego przeciwnika w tej turze, [gold]Przywołaj[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
translations.ptb: Sempre que [gold]Ostheo[/gold] golpear este inimigo neste turno, [gold]Vincule[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
translations.rus: Вы [gold]призываете[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue], когда [gold]Костя[/gold] атакует в этом ходу.
translations.spa: Cuando [gold]Nudillos[/gold] golpee al enemigo este turno, [gold]Vincula[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่[gold]Osty[/gold]โจมตีศัตรูในเทิร์นนี้ [gold]อัญเชิญ[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue]
translations.tur: [gold]Osti[/gold] bu turda bu düşmana her vurduğunda [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Çağır[/gold].

translations.eng: Your next {Amount:plural:Power is|[blue]{}[/blue] Powers are} played an extra time.

translations.deu: Deine nächste{Amount:plural: Macht is|n [blue]{}[/blue] Mächte werden} ein weiteres Mal gespielt.
translations.esp: Juegas {Amount:plural:tu próximo poder|tus próximos [blue]{}[/blue] poderes} otra vez.
translations.fra: {Amount:plural:Le prochain Pouvoir que vous jouez est joué|Les [blue]{}[/blue] prochains Pouvoirs que vous jouez sont joués} une fois de plus.
translations.ita: {Amount:plural:La tua carta Potere successiva viene giocata|Le tue successive [blue]{}[/blue] carte Potere vengono giocate} una volta in più.
translations.jpn: 次にプレイする[blue]{Amount}[/blue]枚のパワーをもう1回プレイする。
translations.pol: {Amount:plural:Następna Moc jest zagrywana|Następne [blue]{}[/blue] Moce są zagrywane|Następnych [blue]{}[/blue] Mocy jest zagrywanych} dwukrotnie.
translations.ptb: {Amount:plural:Seu próximo Poder é jogado|Seus próximos [blue]{}[/blue] Poderes são jogados} uma vez adicional.
translations.rus: {Amount:plural(ru):Следующий Талант разыгрывается|Следующие [blue]{}[/blue] Таланта разыгрываются|Следующие [blue]{}[/blue] Талантов разыгрываются} дополнительный раз.
translations.spa: {Amount:plural:Tu siguiente Poder se juega|Tus siguientes [blue]{}[/blue] Poderes se juegan} una vez más.
translations.tha: การ์ดพลัง{Amount:choose(1):| [blue]{}[/blue] }ใบถัดไปจะถูกเล่นอีกครั้ง

translations.eng: Your next Power is played an extra time.
translations.zhs: 你的下一张能力牌会额外打出一次。

translations.tur: Bir sonraki Güç kartın bir kez daha oynanır.

name: Skittish
description: The first time [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] is hit each turn, it gains [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].

translations.eng: Skittish
translations.zhs: 胆小
translations.deu: Unberechenbar
translations.esp: Timidez
translations.fra: Peureux
translations.ita: Iperattività
translations.jpn: 臆病
translations.ptb: Arisco
translations.spa: Timidez

translations.eng: The first time [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] is hit each turn, it gains [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
translations.zhs: [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold]每回合第一次被命中时，获得[blue]{Amount}[/blue]点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
translations.deu: Wenn [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] zum ersten Mal in einem Zug getroffen wird, erhält er [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
translations.esp: La primera vez que golpeen a [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] en cada turno, obtendrá [blue]{Amount}[/blue] de [gold]bloqueo[/gold].
translations.fra: La première fois de chaque tour que [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] est touché, il gagne [blue]{Amount}[/blue] d'[gold]Armure[/gold].
translations.ita: La prima volta che [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] subisce un attacco in ogni turno, ottiene [blue]{Amount}[/blue] di [gold]Blocco[/gold].
translations.jpn: 毎ターン、[gold]{OwnerName}[/gold]が最初に攻撃を受けた時、[blue]{Amount}[/blue][gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。
translations.kor: 매 턴마다 [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold]가 처음으로 공격을 받을 때, [gold]방어도[/gold]를 [blue]{Amount}[/blue] 얻습니다.
translations.pol: Gdy [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] otrzyma obrażenia po raz pierwszy w tej turze, otrzymuje [blue]{Amount}[/blue] pkt. [gold]Bloku[/gold].
translations.ptb: Na primeira vez que [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] for golpeada a cada turno, recebe [blue]{Amount}[/blue] de [gold]Proteção[/gold].
translations.rus: [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] получает [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]защиты[/gold], когда теряет ОЗ от Атак первый раз за ход.
translations.spa: La primera vez que [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] reciba un golpe cada turno, gana [blue]{Amount}[/blue] de [gold]Bloqueo[/gold].
translations.tha: ครั้งแรกที่ [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] ถูกโจมตีในแต่ละเทิร์น มันจะได้รับ [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]บล็อก[/gold]
translations.tur: [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold], her tur ilk kez hasar aldığında [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Blok[/gold] elde eder.

translations.eng: The first time this creature is hit each turn, it gains [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
translations.zhs: 这个生物每回合第一次被命中时，获得[blue]1[/blue]点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
translations.deu: Wenn diese Kreatur zum ersten Mal in einem Zug getroffen wird, erhält sie [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
translations.esp: La primera vez que golpeen a esta criatura en cada turno, obtendrá [blue]1[/blue] de [gold]bloqueo[/gold].
translations.fra: La première fois de chaque tour que cette créature est touchée, elle gagne [blue]1[/blue] d'[gold]Armure[/gold].
translations.ita: La prima volta che questa creatura subisce un attacco in ogni turno, ottiene [blue]1[/blue] di [gold]Blocco[/gold].
translations.jpn: 毎ターン、最初に攻撃を受けた時、[blue]1[/blue][gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。
translations.kor: 매 턴마다 이 생물이 처음으로 공격을 받을 때, [gold]방어도[/gold]를 [blue]1[/blue] 얻습니다.
translations.pol: Gdy to stworzenie otrzyma obrażenia po raz pierwszy w tej turze, otrzymuje [blue]1[/blue] pkt. [gold]Bloku[/gold].
translations.ptb: Na primeira vez que esta criatura for golpeada a cada turno, ela recebe [blue]1[/blue] de [gold]Proteção[/gold].
translations.rus: Получает [blue]1[/blue] [gold]защиты[/gold], когда теряет ОЗ от Атак первый раз за ход.
translations.spa: La primera vez que esta criatura sea golpeada cada turno, obtiene [blue]1[/blue] de [gold]Bloqueo[/gold].
translations.tha: ครั้งแรกที่สิ่งมีชีวิตนี้ถูกโจมตีในแต่ละเทิร์น มันจะได้รับ [blue]1[/blue] [gold]บล็อก[/gold]
translations.tur: Bu yaratık her tur ilk kez hasar aldığında [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Blok[/gold] elde eder.

name: Sleight of Flesh
description: Whenever you apply a debuff to an enemy, they take [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage.

translations.eng: Sleight of Flesh
translations.zhs: 血肉戏法
translations.deu: Leibeszerfall
translations.esp: Libra de carne
translations.fra: Tour de chair
translations.ita: Manipolazione Corporea
translations.jpn: 呪肉の奇術
translations.ptb: Manipulação Corpórea
translations.spa: Perturbación corporal

translations.eng: Whenever you apply a debuff to an enemy, they take [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage.
translations.zhs: 每当你给予一个敌人负面状态时，使其受到[blue]{Amount}[/blue]点伤害。
translations.deu: Wenn du einen Debuff auf einen Gegner anwendest, nimmt er [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Schaden.
translations.esp: Al aplicar una desmejora a un enemigo, este recibe [blue]{Amount}[/blue] de daño.
translations.fra: Lorsque vous appliquez un effet néfaste sur un ennemi, celui-ci subit [blue]{Amount}[/blue] dégâts.
translations.ita: Ogni volta che applichi un debuff a un nemico, subisce [blue]{Amount}[/blue] di danno.
translations.jpn: 敵にデバフを付与するたび、その敵は[blue]{Amount}[/blue]ダメージを受ける。
translations.kor: 적에게 해로운 효과를 부여할 때마다, 대상 적이 피해를 [blue]{Amount}[/blue] 받습니다.
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek nałożysz osłabienie na przeciwnika, otrzymuje dodatkowo [blue]{Amount}[/blue] pkt. obrażeń.
translations.ptb: Sempre que você aplicar um efeito negativo a um inimigo, ele sofre [blue]{Amount}[/blue] de dano.
translations.rus: Наносит цели [blue]{Amount}[/blue] урона, когда вы накладываете отрицательный эффект.
translations.spa: Cuando apliques un efecto negativo a un enemigo, este recibe [blue]{Amount}[/blue] de daño.
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณสร้างผลผิดปกติใส่ศัตรู มันจะได้รับความเสียหาย [blue]{Amount}[/blue]
translations.tur: Bir düşmana her güçsüzleştirme uyguladığında, düşman [blue]{Amount}[/blue] hasar alır.

translations.eng: Whenever you apply a debuff to an enemy, they take [blue]13[/blue] damage.

translations.kor: 적에게 해로운 효과를 부여할 때마다, 대상 적이 피해를 [blue]13[/blue] 받습니다.
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek nałożysz osłabienie na przeciwnika, otrzymuje dodatkowo [blue]13[/blue] pkt. obrażeń.
translations.ptb: Sempre que você aplicar um efeito negativo a um inimigo, ele sofre [blue]13[/blue] de dano.

translations.spa: Cuando apliques un efecto negativo a un enemigo, este recibe [blue]13[/blue] de daño.

translations.tur: Bir düşmana her güçsüzleştirme uyguladığında, düşman [blue]13[/blue] hasar alır.

translations.eng: The next {Amount:plural:time|[blue]{}[/blue] times} [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] loses HP, it only loses [blue]1[/blue] HP instead.
translations.zhs: [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold]下[blue]{Amount}[/blue]次要失去生命值时，只会失去[blue]1[/blue]点生命。
translations.deu: Wenn [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] {Amount:plural:das nächste Mal|die nächsten [blue]{}[/blue] Male} TP verliert, verliert es stattdessen nur [blue]1[/blue] TP.
translations.esp: {Amount:plural:La próxima vez|Las próximas [blue]{}[/blue] veces} que [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] pierda PV, solo perderá [blue]1[/blue] PV.
translations.fra: {Amount:plural:La prochaine fois|Les [blue]{}[/blue] prochaines fois} que [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] doit perdre des PV, elle perd seulement [blue]1[/blue] PV.
translations.ita: {Amount:plural:La prossima volta che|Le prossime [blue]{}[/blue] volte che} [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] perde PV, ne perde solo [blue]1[/blue].
translations.jpn: 次に[gold]{OwnerName}[/gold]がHPを失う時、代わりにHPを[blue]1[/blue]だけ失う。（残り[blue]{Amount}[/blue]回）
translations.pol: {Amount:plural:Następny raz|Następne [blue]{}[/blue] razy|Następnych [blue]{}[/blue] razy} gdy [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] utraci PŻ, zamiast tego traci tylko [blue]1[/blue] PŻ.
translations.ptb: {Amount:plural:Na próxima vez|Nas próximas [blue]{}[/blue] vezes} que [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] perder PV, perde somente [blue]1[/blue] PV.
translations.rus: {Amount:plural(ru):Следующий раз|Следующие [blue]{}[/blue] раза|Следующие [blue]{}[/blue] раз}, когда [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] {Amount:plural(ru):потеряет|теряет|теряет} ОЗ, отнимается только [blue]1[/blue] ОЗ.
translations.spa: {Amount:plural:La siguiente vez|Las siguientes [blue]{}[/blue] veces} que [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] pierda PV, solo pierde [blue]1[/blue] PV.
translations.tha: {Amount:choose(1):time|[blue]{}[/blue] }ครั้งถัดไปที่ [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] จะเสีย HP มันจะเสียแค่ [blue]1[/blue] HP แทน

translations.eng: The next time this creature loses HP, it only loses [blue]1[/blue] HP instead.
translations.zhs: 这个生物下一次要失去生命值时，只会失去[blue]1[/blue]点生命。
translations.deu: Wenn diese Kreatur das nächste Mal TP verliert, verliert sie stattdessen nur [blue]1[/blue] TP.
translations.esp: La próxima vez que esta criatura pierda PV, solo perderá [blue]1[/blue] PV.
translations.fra: La prochaine fois que cette créature doit perdre des PV, elle perd seulement [blue]1[/blue] PV.
translations.ita: La prossima volta che questa creatura perde PV, ne perde solo [blue]1[/blue].
translations.jpn: 次にこのモンスターがHPを失う時、代わりにHPを[blue]1[/blue]だけ失う。
translations.kor: 이 생물이 다음에 체력을 잃을 시, [blue]1[/blue]만 잃습니다.
translations.pol: Następny raz gdy to stworzenie utraci PŻ, zamiast tego traci tylko [blue]1[/blue] PŻ.
translations.ptb: Na próxima vez que esta criatura perder PV, ela perde apenas [blue]1[/blue] PV.
translations.spa: La siguiente vez que esta criatura pierda PV, solo pierde [blue]1[/blue] PV.
translations.tha: ครั้งถัดไปที่สิ่งมีชีวิตนี้จะเสีย HP มันจะเสียแค่ [blue]1[/blue] HP แทน
translations.tur: Bu yaratık sonraki CP kaybedişinde sadece [blue]1[/blue] CP kaybeder.

name: Sloth
description: You cannot play more than [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:card|cards} each turn.

translations.eng: Sloth
translations.zhs: 懒惰
translations.deu: Faulheit
translations.esp: Pereza
translations.fra: Paresse
translations.ita: Pigrizia
translations.jpn: 怠惰
translations.ptb: Preguiça
translations.spa: Flojera
translations.tha: ความเกียจคร้าน

translations.eng: You cannot play more than [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:card|cards} each turn.
translations.zhs: 你在每个回合不能打出超过[blue]{Amount}[/blue]张牌。
translations.deu: Du kannst nicht mehr als [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:Karte|Karten} pro Zug spielen.
translations.esp: No puedes jugar más de [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:carta|cartas} en cada turno.
translations.fra: Vous ne pouvez jouer plus de [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:carte|cartes} par tour.
translations.ita: Non puoi giocare più di [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:carta|carte} in ogni turno.
translations.jpn: 毎ターン、[blue]{Amount}[/blue]枚までしかカードをプレイできない。
translations.kor: 매 턴마다 카드를 최대 [blue]{Amount}[/blue]장까지만 사용할 수 있습니다.
translations.pol: W każdej turze nie możesz zagrać więcej niż [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:kartę|karty|kart}.
translations.ptb: Você não pode jogar mais de [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:carta|cartas} a cada turno.
translations.rus: Вы можете разыграть не более [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural(ru):карты|карт|карт} за ход.
translations.spa: No puedes jugar más de [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:carta|cartas} por turno.
translations.tha: คุณเล่นการ์ดได้ไม่เกิน [blue]{Amount}[/blue] ใบในแต่ละเทิร์น

translations.eng: You cannot play more than [blue]3[/blue] cards each turn.
translations.zhs: 你在每个回合不能打出超过[blue]3[/blue]张牌。
translations.deu: Du kannst nicht mehr als [blue]3[/blue] Karten pro Zug spielen.
translations.esp: No puedes jugar más de [blue]3[/blue] cartas en cada turno.
translations.fra: Vous ne pouvez jouer plus de [blue]3[/blue] cartes par tour.
translations.ita: Non puoi giocare più di [blue]3[/blue] carte in ogni turno.
translations.jpn: 毎ターン、[blue]3[/blue]枚までしかカードをプレイできない。
translations.kor: 매 턴마다 카드를 최대 [blue]3[/blue]장까지만 사용할 수 있습니다.
translations.pol: W każdej turze nie możesz zagrać więcej niż [blue]3[/blue] karty.
translations.ptb: Você não pode jogar mais de [blue]3[/blue] cartas a cada turno.
translations.rus: Вы можете разыграть не более [blue]3[/blue] карт за ход.
translations.spa: No puedes jugar más de [blue]3[/blue] cartas por turno.
translations.tha: คุณเล่นการ์ดได้ไม่เกิน [blue]3[/blue] ใบในแต่ละเทิร์น
translations.tur: Her turda en fazla [blue]3[/blue] kart oynayabilirsin.

name: Slow
description: Whenever you play a card, {OnPlayer:you receive|this enemy receives} [blue]10%[/blue] more damage from Attacks this turn.{Amount:plural:|| (Receives [blue]{Amount}%[/blue] more damage)}

translations.eng: Slow
translations.zhs: 缓慢
translations.deu: Langsam
translations.esp: Lentitud
translations.fra: Ralenti
translations.ita: Rallentamento
translations.jpn: スロウ
translations.ptb: Lentidão
translations.spa: Lentitud

translations.eng: Whenever you play a card, {OnPlayer:you receive|this enemy receives} [blue]10%[/blue] more damage from Attacks this turn.{Amount:plural:|| (Receives [blue]{Amount}%[/blue] more damage)}
translations.zhs: 你在本回合内每打出一张牌，{OnPlayer:你|该敌人}本回合从攻击牌中受到的伤害增加[blue]10%[/blue]。{Amount:plural:|}
translations.deu: Wenn du eine Karte spielst, {OnPlayer:erhältst du|erhält dieser Gegner} für diesen Zug [blue]10%[/blue] mehr Schaden durch Angriffe.{Amount:plural:|| (Erhält [blue]{Amount}%[/blue] mehr Schaden)}
translations.esp: Al jugar una carta, {OnPlayer:recibes|este enemigo recibe} un [blue]10 %[/blue] más de daño en este turno.{Amount:plural:|| (Recibe un [blue]{Amount} %[/blue] más de daño)}
translations.fra: Chaque fois que vous jouez une carte, {OnPlayer:vous subissez|cet ennemi subit} [blue]10%[/blue] de dégâts d'Attaque supplémentaires pendant ce tour.{Amount:plural:|| (Dégâts subis augmentés de [blue]{Amount}%[/blue])}
translations.ita: Ogni volta che giochi questa carta, {OnPlayer:subisci|questo nemico subisce} un [blue]10%[/blue] di danno extra in questo turno.{Amount:plural:|| (Subisci un [blue]{Amount}%[/blue] di danno extra)}
translations.jpn: このターン、カードをプレイするたび、{OnPlayer:自身が|この敵が}アタックから受けるダメージが[blue]10%[/blue]増加する。{Amount:plural:|[blue][/blue]}
translations.kor: 카드를 사용할 때마다, 이번 턴 동안 {OnPlayer:내가|대상 적이} 공격 카드를 통해 받는 피해량이 [blue]10%[/blue] 증가합니다.{Amount:choose(1):| (피해량이 [blue]{Amount}%[/blue] 증가합니다)}
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek zagrasz kartę, {OnPlayer:otrzymujesz|ten przeciwnik otrzymuje} [blue]10%[/blue] więcej obrażeń od Ataków w tej turze.{Amount:plural:|| (Otrzymuje [blue]{Amount}%[/blue] więcej obrażeń)}
translations.ptb: Sempre que você jogar uma carta, {OnPlayer:você sofre|este inimigo sofre} [blue]10%[/blue] mais dano de Ataques neste turno.{Amount:plural:|| (Sofre [blue]{Amount}%[/blue] mais dano)}
translations.rus: {OnPlayer:Вы получаете|Получает} на [blue]10%[/blue] больше урона от Атак в этом ходу после того, как{OnPlayer:| вы} разыгрываете карту.{Amount:plural:||}
translations.spa: Cuando juegues una carta, {OnPlayer:recibes|este enemigo recibe} un [blue]10 %[/blue] más de daño de Ataques este turno{Amount:plural:|| (Recibe un [blue]{Amount} %[/blue] más de daño)}.
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณเล่นการ์ด {OnPlayer:คุณ|ศัตรูนี้}จะได้รับความเสียหายจากการโจมตีเพิ่ม [blue]10%[/blue] ในเทิร์นนี้{Amount:plural:|| (ได้รับความเสียหายเพิ่ม [blue]{Amount}%[/blue])}
translations.tur: Her kart oynadığında, {OnPlayer:Saldırılardan bu tur alacağın hasar|bu düşmanın Saldırılardan bu tur alacağı hasar} [blue]%10[/blue] artar. {Amount:plural:|| ([blue]%{Amount}[/blue] daha fazla hasar alır)}

translations.eng: Whenever you play a card, this enemy receives [blue]10%[/blue] more damage from Attacks this turn.
translations.zhs: 你在本回合内每打出一张牌，该敌人本回合从攻击牌中受到的伤害增加[blue]10%[/blue]。
translations.deu: Wenn du eine Karte spielst, erhält dieser Gegner für diesen Zug [blue]10%[/blue] mehr Schaden durch Angriffe.
translations.esp: Al jugar una carta, este enemigo recibe un [blue]10 %[/blue] más de daño en este turno.
translations.fra: Chaque fois que vous jouez une carte, cet ennemi subit [blue]10%[/blue] de dégâts d'Attaque supplémentaires pendant ce tour.
translations.ita: Ogni volta che giochi una carta, questo nemico subisce il [blue]10%[/blue] di danno extra dalle carte Attacco in questo turno.
translations.jpn: このターン、カードをプレイするたび、この敵がアタックから受けるダメージが[blue]10%[/blue]増加する。
translations.kor: 카드를 사용할 때마다, 이번 턴 동안 대상 적이 공격 카드를 통해 받는 피해량이 [blue]10%[/blue] 증가합니다.
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek zagrasz kartę, ten przeciwnik otrzymuje [blue]10%[/blue] więcej obrażeń od Ataków w tej turze.
translations.ptb: Sempre que você jogar uma carta, este inimigo sofre [blue]10%[/blue] mais dano de Ataques neste turno.
translations.rus: Получает на [blue]10%[/blue] больше урона от Атак в этом ходу, когда вы разыгрываете карты.
translations.spa: Cuando juegues una carta, este enemigo recibe un [blue]10 %[/blue] más de daño de Ataques este turno.
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณเล่นการ์ด ศัตรูนี้จะได้รับความเสียหายจากการโจมตีเพิ่ม [blue]10%[/blue] ในเทิร์นนี้
translations.tur: Bu tur her kart oynadığında, bu düşman Saldırılardan [blue]%10[/blue] daha fazla hasar alır.

name: Slumber
description: Awakens upon taking turns or losing HP [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:time|times}.

translations.eng: Slumber
translations.zhs: 熟睡
translations.deu: Schlummern
translations.esp: Somnolencia
translations.fra: Endormi
translations.ita: Sonnolenza
translations.jpn: まどろみ
translations.ptb: Letargia
translations.spa: Letargo

translations.eng: Awakens upon taking turns or losing HP [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:time|times}.
translations.zhs: 在一定回合经过后或失去生命[blue]{Amount}[/blue]次后苏醒。
translations.deu: Erwacht nach [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:Zug oder TP-Verlust|Zügen oder TP-Verlusten}.
translations.esp: Despierta tras pasar ciertos turnos o perder PV [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:vez|veces}.
translations.fra: Se réveille après un certain nombre de tours ou après avoir perdu des PV [blue]{Amount}[/blue] fois.
translations.ita: Si risveglia dopo aver completato il turno o perdendo PV [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:volta|volte}.
translations.jpn: ターンが経過するか、HPを[blue]{Amount}[/blue]回失うと目覚める。
translations.kor: 턴이 경과하거나 체력을 잃는 것이 [blue]{Amount}[/blue]번 발생 시, 깨어납니다.
translations.pol: Budzi się po rozegraniu [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:tury|tur|tur} lub po utraceniu PŻ [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:raz|razy|razy}.
translations.ptb: Desperta após alguns turnos ou ao perder PV [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:vez|vezes}.
translations.rus: Пробуждается {Amount:plural(ru):в конце этого хода|через [blue]{}[/blue] хода|через [blue]{}[/blue] ходов} или после того, как потеряет ОЗ [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural(ru):раз|раза|раз}.
translations.spa: Se despierta después de varios turnos o al perder PV [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:vez|veces}.
translations.tha: จะตื่นหลังจากผ่านเทิร์นหรือเสีย HP [blue]{Amount}[/blue] ครั้ง
translations.tur: Geçen tur sayısı veya düşmanın CP kaybetme sayısı [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:olduğunda|olduğunda} uyanır.

translations.eng: Awakens upon taking turns or losing HP 3 times.
translations.zhs: 在一定回合经过后或失去生命3次后苏醒。
translations.deu: Erwacht nach 3 Zügen oder TP-Verlusten.
translations.esp: Despierta tras pasar ciertos turnos o perder PV tres veces.
translations.fra: Se réveille au bout d'un certain nombre de tours ou après avoir perdu des PV 3 fois.
translations.ita: Si risveglia dopo aver completato il turno o aver perso PV 3 volte.
translations.jpn: ターンが経過するか、HPを3回失うと目覚める。
translations.kor: 턴이 경과하거나 체력을 잃는 것이 3번 발생 시, 깨어납니다.
translations.pol: Budzi się po rozegraniu 3 tur lub po utraceniu PŻ 3 razy.
translations.ptb: Desperta após alguns turnos ou ao perder PV 3 vezes.
translations.rus: Пробуждается через 3 хода или после того, как 3 раза потеряет ОЗ.
translations.spa: Se despierta después de varios turnos o al perder PV 3 veces.
translations.tha: จะตื่นหลังจากผ่านเทิร์นหรือเสีย HP 3 ครั้ง
translations.tur: Geçen tur sayısı veya düşmanın CP kaybetme sayısı 3 olduğunda uyanır.

name: Smokestack
description: Whenever you create a Status, deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.

translations.eng: Smokestack
translations.zhs: 烟囱
translations.deu: Schlot

translations.fra: Cheminée
translations.ita: Ciminiera
translations.jpn: 煙突
translations.ptb: Chaminé
translations.spa: Chimenea

translations.eng: Whenever you create a Status, deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
translations.zhs: 每当你生成一张状态牌时，对所有敌人造成[blue]{Amount}[/blue]点伤害。
translations.deu: Wenn du einen Status erzeugst, füge ALLEN Gegnern [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Schaden zu.
translations.esp: Al crear un estado, provoca [blue]{Amount}[/blue] de daño a TODOS los enemigos
translations.fra: Lorsque vous créez un Statut, infligez [blue]{Amount}[/blue] dégâts à TOUS les ennemis.
translations.ita: Ogni volta che crei una carta Stato, infliggi [blue]{Amount}[/blue] di danno a TUTTI i nemici.
translations.jpn: 状態異常を作成するたび、すべての敵に[blue]{Amount}[/blue]ダメージを与える。
translations.kor: 상태이상 카드를 생성할 때마다, 모든 적에게 피해를 [blue]{Amount}[/blue] 줍니다.
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek stworzysz kartę Stanu, zadaj [blue]{Amount}[/blue] pkt. obrażeń WSZYSTKIM przeciwnikom.
translations.ptb: Sempre que você criar uma carta de Condição, cause [blue]{Amount}[/blue] de dano a TODOS os inimigos.
translations.rus: Наносит [blue]{Amount}[/blue] урона ВСЕМ врагам, когда вы создаете Статус.
translations.spa: Cuando crees una carta de Estado, inflige [blue]{Amount}[/blue] de daño a TODOS los enemigos.
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณสร้างการ์ดสถานะ สร้างความเสียหาย [blue]{Amount}[/blue] ใส่ศัตรูทั้งหมด
translations.tur: Bir Durum kartı oluşturduğunda TÜM düşmanlara [blue]{Amount}[/blue] hasar ver.

translations.eng: Whenever you create a Status, deal damage to ALL enemies.
translations.zhs: 每当你生成一张状态牌时，对所有敌人造成伤害。
translations.deu: Wenn du einen Status erzeugst, füge ALLEN Gegnern Schaden zu.
translations.esp: Al crear un estado, provoca daño a TODOS los enemigos.
translations.fra: Lorsque vous créez un Statut, infligez des dégâts à TOUS les ennemis.
translations.ita: Ogni volta che crei una carta Stato, infliggi danno a TUTTI i nemici.
translations.jpn: 状態異常を作成するたび、すべての敵にダメージを与える。
translations.kor: 상태이상 카드를 생성할 때마다, 모든 적에게 피해를 줍니다.
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek stworzysz kartę Stanu, zadaj obrażenia WSZYSTKIM przeciwnikom.
translations.ptb: Sempre que você criar uma carta de Condição, cause dano a TODOS os inimigos.

name: Sneaky

translations.zhs: 鬼祟
translations.deu: Gewieft
translations.esp: Furtiva
translations.fra: Furtivité
translations.ita: Furtività

name: Stampede
description: At the end of your turn, [blue]{Amount}[/blue] random {Amount:plural:Attack|Attacks} in your [gold]Hand[/gold] {Amount:plural:is played against a random enemy.|are played against a random enemy.}

translations.eng: Stampede
translations.zhs: 惊逃
translations.deu: Ansturm
translations.esp: Estampida
translations.fra: Ruée
translations.ita: Assalto
translations.jpn: 暴走
translations.ptb: Estouro

translations.eng: At the end of your turn, [blue]{Amount}[/blue] random {Amount:plural:Attack|Attacks} in your [gold]Hand[/gold] {Amount:plural:is played against a random enemy.|are played against a random enemy.}
translations.zhs: 在你的回合结束时，随机打出你[gold]手牌[/gold]中的[blue]{Amount}[/blue]张攻击牌攻击随机敌人。
translations.deu: Am Ende deines Zuges {Amount:plural:wird|werden} [blue]{Amount}[/blue] zufällige{Amount:plural:r Angriff| Angriffe} aus deiner [gold]Hand[/gold] gegen einen zufälligen Gegner gespielt.
translations.esp: Al final del turno, se juega [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:carta de ataque|cartas de ataque} de la [gold]mano[/gold] al azar {Amount:plural:contra un enemigo|contra un enemigo} también al azar.
translations.fra: À la fin de votre tour, [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:Attaque aléatoire|Attaques aléatoires} de votre [gold]Main[/gold] {Amount:plural:est jouée sur un ennemi aléatoire.|sont jouées sur des ennemis aléatoires.}
translations.ita: Al termine de tuo turno, [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:carta Attacco casuale|carte Attacco casuali} nella tua [gold]mano[/gold] {Amount:plural:viene giocata contro un nemico casuale.|vengono giocate contro un nemico casuale.}

translations.kor: 내 턴 종료 시, [gold]손[/gold]에 있는 무작위 공격 카드 [blue]{Amount}[/blue]장을 무작위 적에게 사용합니다.
translations.pol: Pod koniec tury zagraj [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:losowy Atak|losowe Ataki|losowych Ataków} w [gold]ręcę[/gold] na losowego przeciwnika.
translations.ptb: No final do seu turno, [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:Ataque aleatório|Ataques aleatórios} na sua [gold]Mão[/gold] {Amount:plural:é jogado|são jogados} contra um inimigo aleatório.
translations.rus: Вы разыгрываете [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural(ru):случайную Атаку|случайные Атаки|случайных Атак} из [gold]руки[/gold] против случайного врага в конце хода.
translations.spa: Al final de tu turno, [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:Ataque aleatorio|Ataques aleatorios} de tu [gold]Mano[/gold] se {Amount:plural:juega|juegan} contra un enemigo aleatorio.
translations.tha: ตอนจบเทิร์น เล่นการ์ดโจมตี [blue]{Amount}[/blue] ใบแบบสุ่มจาก[gold]มือ[/gold]ใส่ศัตรู 1 ตัวแบบสุ่ม

translations.eng: When killed, deals [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage at the end of your next turn.

translations.ptb: Quando derrotada, causa [blue]{Amount}[/blue] de dano ao jogador no final do turno.

translations.spa: Cuando juegues una carta este turno, el enemigo pierde [blue]2[/blue] PV.

translations.tur: Bu tur her kart oynadığında bu düşman [blue]2[/blue] CP kaybeder.

name: Stratagem
description: Whenever you shuffle your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], choose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:card|cards} from it to put into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

translations.eng: Stratagem
translations.zhs: 计策
translations.deu: Strategema
translations.esp: Estratagema
translations.fra: Stratagème
translations.ita: Stratagemma
translations.jpn: 計略
translations.ptb: Estratagema
translations.spa: Estratagema

translations.eng: Whenever you shuffle your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], choose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:card|cards} from it to put into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
translations.zhs: 你每次洗牌[gold]抽牌堆[/gold]时，从中选择[blue]{Amount}[/blue]张牌放入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]。
translations.deu: Wenn du deinen [gold]Nachziehstapel[/gold] mischst, wähle daraus [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:Karte|Karten}, die du auf deine [gold]Hand[/gold] nimmst.
translations.esp: Al barajar el [gold]mazo de robo[/gold], eliges [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:carta|cartas} para colocar en tu [gold]mano[/gold].
translations.fra: Lorsque vous mélangez votre [gold]Pioche[/gold], choisissez [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:carte|cartes} de la pile à ajouter à votre [gold]Main[/gold].
translations.ita: Ogni volta che mischi il tuo [gold]mazzo di pesca[/gold], scegli [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:carta|carte} del mazzo da aggiungere alla tua [gold]mano[/gold].
translations.jpn: [gold]山札[/gold]をシャッフルするたび、そこからカードを[blue]{Amount}[/blue]枚選んで[gold]手札[/gold]に加える。
translations.kor: [gold]뽑을 카드 더미[/gold]를 섞을 때마다, 카드를 [blue]{Amount}[/blue]장 선택해 [gold]손[/gold]으로 가져옵니다.
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek przetasujesz [gold]stos rozgrywający[/gold], wybierz z niego [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:kartę|karty|kart} i umieść {Amount:plural:ją|je|je} w [gold]ręce[/gold].
translations.ptb: Sempre que você embaralhar a sua [gold]Pilha de Compra[/gold], escolha [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:carta|cartas} nela para colocar na sua [gold]Mão[/gold].
translations.rus: При перемешивании [gold]стопки добора[/gold] переносит в [gold]руку[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural(ru):карту|карты|карт}карту на выбор.
translations.spa: Cuando barajes tu [gold]Pila de robo[/gold], elige [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:carta y colócala|cartas y colócalas} en tu [gold]Mano[/gold].
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณสับ[gold]กองจั่ว[/gold] เลือกการ์ด [blue]{Amount}[/blue] ใบจากในนั้นเพื่อนำขึ้น[gold]มือ[/gold]
translations.tur: [gold]Çekme Deste[/gold]'ni her yeniden karıştırdığında bu desteden [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:kart|kart} seç ve [gold]El[/gold]'ine koy.

translations.eng: Whenever you shuffle your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], choose [blue]1[/blue] card from it to put into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
translations.zhs: 你每次洗牌[gold]抽牌堆[/gold]时，从中选择[blue]1[/blue]张牌放入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]。
translations.deu: Wenn you shuffle your [gold]Nachziehstapel[/gold], choose [blue]1[/blue] Karte from it to put auf deine [gold]Hand[/gold].
translations.esp: Al barajar el [gold]mazo de robo[/gold], eliges [blue]1[/blue] carta para colocar en tu [gold]mano[/gold].
translations.fra: Lorsque vous mélangez votre [gold]Pioche[/gold], choisissez [blue]1[/blue] carte de la pile à ajouter à votre [gold]Main[/gold].
translations.ita: Ogni volta che mischi il tuo [gold]mazzo di pesca[/gold], scegli [blue]1[/blue] carta da esso e aggiungila alla tua [gold]mano[/gold].
translations.jpn: [gold]山札[/gold]をシャッフルするたび、そこからカードを[blue]1[/blue]枚選んで[gold]手札[/gold]に加える。
translations.kor: [gold]뽑을 카드 더미[/gold]를 섞을 때마다, 카드를 [blue]1[/blue]장 선택해 [gold]손[/gold]으로 가져옵니다.
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek przetasujesz [gold]stos rozgrywający[/gold], wybierz z niego [blue]1[/blue] kartę i umieść ją w [gold]ręce[/gold].
translations.ptb: Sempre que você embaralhar a sua [gold]Pilha de Compra[/gold], escolha [blue]1[/blue] carta nela para colocar na sua [gold]Mão[/gold].
translations.rus: При перемешивании [gold]стопки добора[/gold] переносит в [gold]руку[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] карту на выбор.
translations.spa: Cuando barajes tu [gold]Pila de robo[/gold], elige [blue]1[/blue] carta y colócala en tu [gold]Mano[/gold].
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณสับ[gold]กองจั่ว[/gold] เลือกการ์ด [blue]1[/blue] ใบจากในนั้นเพื่อนำขึ้น[gold]มือ[/gold]
translations.tur: [gold]Çekme Deste[/gold]'ni her yeniden karıştırdığında bu desteden [blue]1[/blue] kart seç ve [gold]El[/gold]'ine koy.
